_comment: Edit this file to control your Daily Ops Briefing. Add/remove client action items and deadlines. The nightly agent reads this, computes days-until-due, and emails you a prioritized summary.

clients.name: Tammy Jennissen
clients.note: Executive Platinum AA · 1M+ Amex MR · 1.6M AA · 500K+ Marriott

items.title: Book Casa di Langa via Amex FHR
items.detail: Piedmont, Aug 5-9. 15% Amex Fine Hotels & Resorts discount expires Jun 30. Awaiting Tammy's confirmation to book.

items.title: Confirm & book Milan Marriott
items.detail: 120,000 Bonvoy points, Aug 11-13. Best value of the 4 options reviewed.

items.title: Book Tokyo JAL AA167 (award space now open)
items.detail: JFK->HND nonstop, 35,000 AA miles + $5.60. Award space opened ~Mar 2026. Cash value $913-983 - lock it in before Dec demand spikes.

clients.name: Darren Fernandez
clients.note: Group travel, 6 passengers · United MileagePlus + Amex MR (balances TBD)

items.title: Get United & Amex MR balances
items.detail: Needed to map South Africa Dec 16 - Jan 1 for 6 passengers. Peak season - Turkish/Ethiopian/Qatar as cash alternatives.
